product: RevOps / workflow-automation platform for mid-market GTM teams

architecture.topology: modular monolith (Rails) + 3 Go microservices (sequencing, enrichment, webhooks)
architecture.multitenancy: shared-schema with tenant_id; no per-tenant data isolation at the row-encryption level

scaling_cliff.hypothesis: primary Postgres write path saturates near ~3x current write load (~7,200 rps) — single-writer ceiling
scaling_cliff.mitigation: read-replica offload done; write-sharding / Citus not started

tech_debt.item: auth service still on v1 API, blocks SSO/SCIM for enterprise
AI sequencing service has no eval harness / model governance

security_posture.soc2_type2: report exists, ONE exception (access-review control skipped a quarter)
security_posture.pen_test: last external pen test 16 months ago (overdue)

ai_feature.name: auto-sequencing
ai_feature.data_used: customer CRM data including EU personal data (training + inference)
ai_feature.governance: no model card, no eval harness, no documented data-retention for training set
ai_feature.regulatory_flag: EU personal data in an AI system -> EU AI Act + GDPR surface

integration_view.build_vs_buy_for_us: BUY (this IS the capability we would otherwise build ~18 months to replicate)
integration_view.key_dependency: must put auth/tenancy debt on the critical path before cross-sell to our enterprise base

source: cto-advisor (tech-debt scoring, DORA, build-vs-buy, scaling-cliff) + cto-review Q1/Q2/Q4/Q6 (scaling cliff, tech-debt inventory, build-vs-buy TCO, security & compliance surface)
